---
title: "Panel Mixed Measles Report"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    embed-resources: true
execute:
  echo: false
---

**GPU Model Used:** NVIDIA RTX 6000 (Blackwell)

```{python Import modules}
import os
import pickle
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
import pypomp as pp
import jax
from plotnine import *

theme_set(theme_minimal())
```

```{python Runtime}
import datetime
print(datetime.datetime.now())
```

```{python Load data}
PKL_PATH = "u20_results/panel_measles_results.pkl"
pomp_obj = pickle.load(open(PKL_PATH, "rb"))
```

```{python Prepare frames}
LL_frame = pomp_obj.results()
traces = pomp_obj.traces()

traces_melted = traces.rename(
    columns={"replicate": "theta_idx", "iteration": "iter"}
).melt(
    id_vars=["theta_idx", "iter", "logLik", "method", "unit"],
    var_name="quantity",
    value_name="param_value",
)
traces_melted["theta_idx"] = traces_melted["theta_idx"].astype(str)

last_iter = traces_melted["iter"].max()
best_pfilter = traces_melted[
    (traces_melted["iter"] == last_iter) & (traces_melted["method"] == "pfilter")
]
if not best_pfilter.empty:
    best_theta_idx_val = (
        best_pfilter.groupby("theta_idx")["logLik"]
        .first()
        .sort_values(ascending=False)
        .index[0]
    )
else:
    best_theta_idx_val = traces_melted["theta_idx"].iloc[0]
```

# Python results

## Tables

### Summary
```{python}
print(
    pomp_obj.results(ignore_nan=True)
    .sort_values(by="shared logLik", ascending=False)
    .head()
)
```

```{python}
print(pomp_obj.results(ignore_nan=True)[["unit", "unit logLik"]].groupby("unit").max())
```

### Top results for each method call
```{python}
pomp_obj.print_summary()
```

## Plot traces

### Natural scale traces

```{python}
MAX_UNITS = 20
unique_units = [u for u in traces_melted["unit"].unique() if u != "shared"][:MAX_UNITS]
traces_filtered = traces_melted[traces_melted["unit"].isin(unique_units)]

unique_params = traces_melted["quantity"].unique()
shared_params = pomp_obj.canonical_shared_param_names
```

### Transformed scale traces
```{python Plot traces (transformed scale)}
def logit(x):
    return np.log(x / (1 - x))


traces_pertubation_scale = traces_melted.copy()

log_params = [
    "R0",
    "sigma",
    "gamma",
    "iota",
    "sigmaSE",
    "psi",
    "S_0",
    "E_0",
    "I_0",
    "R_0",
]
logit_params = ["rho", "cohort", "amplitude"]

mask_log = traces_pertubation_scale["quantity"].isin(log_params)
traces_pertubation_scale.loc[mask_log, "param_value"] = np.log(
    traces_pertubation_scale.loc[mask_log, "param_value"]
)

mask_logit = traces_pertubation_scale["quantity"].isin(logit_params)
traces_pertubation_scale.loc[mask_logit, "param_value"] = logit(
    traces_pertubation_scale.loc[mask_logit, "param_value"]
)

unique_params = traces_pertubation_scale["quantity"].unique()

for param in unique_params:
    if param in shared_params:
        param_data = traces_pertubation_scale[(traces_pertubation_scale["quantity"] == param) & (traces_pertubation_scale["unit"] == "shared")]
        p = (
            ggplot(
                param_data,
                aes(x="iter", y="param_value", group="theta_idx", color="theta_idx"),
            )
            + geom_line(show_legend=False)
            + facet_wrap("unit")
            + ggtitle(f"Shared Parameter (scaled): {param}")
            + theme(figure_size=(8, 5))
        )
    else:
        param_data = traces_pertubation_scale[(traces_pertubation_scale["quantity"] == param) & (traces_pertubation_scale["unit"].isin(unique_units))]
        p = (
            ggplot(
                param_data,
                aes(x="iter", y="param_value", group="theta_idx", color="theta_idx"),
            )
            + geom_line(show_legend=False)
            + facet_wrap("unit", scales="free_y")
            + ggtitle(f"Unit-Specific Parameter (scaled): {param}")
            + theme(figure_size=(16, 12))
        )
    p.show()
```


```{python Final parameter values}
# Violin plots for final pfilter iterations (previously eval = FALSE logic)
# for unit_val in unique_units:
#     unit_data = traces_pertubation_scale[(traces_pertubation_scale["unit"] == unit_val) & (traces_pertubation_scale["method"] == "pfilter")]
#     if not unit_data.empty:
#         p = (
#             ggplot(unit_data, aes(y="param_value", x="quantity"))
#             + geom_violin()
#             + facet_wrap("~quantity", scales="free")
#             + ggtitle(f"Unit Violin: {unit_val}")
#         )
#         print(p)
```


### LogLik traces

```{python Plot LL traces}
# Overall (shared) LogLik trace
ll_shared = traces_melted[traces_melted["unit"] == "shared"][["iter", "theta_idx", "unit", "logLik"]].drop_duplicates()
p_shared = (
    ggplot(ll_shared, aes(x="iter", y="logLik", group="theta_idx", color="theta_idx"))
    + geom_line(show_legend=False)
    + facet_wrap("unit")
    + ggtitle("Overall LogLik Trace")
    + theme(figure_size=(8, 5))
)
p_shared.show()

# Unit-specific LogLik traces
ll_units = traces_melted[traces_melted["unit"].isin(unique_units)][["iter", "theta_idx", "unit", "logLik"]].drop_duplicates()
p_units = (
    ggplot(ll_units, aes(x="iter", y="logLik", group="theta_idx", color="theta_idx"))
    + geom_line(show_legend=False)
    + facet_wrap("unit", scales="free_y")
    + ggtitle("Unit-Specific LogLik Traces")
    + theme(figure_size=(16, 12))
)
p_units.show()
```

### LogLik density

```{python Plot LL density}
df_second_to_last = pomp_obj.results(-2)

# Overall (shared) LogLik density
df_shared_ll = df_second_to_last[["theta_idx", "shared logLik"]].drop_duplicates()
p_density_shared = (
    ggplot(df_shared_ll, aes(x="shared logLik"))
    + geom_density(fill="#4F46E5", color="#4F46E5", alpha=0.4)
    + ggtitle("Overall LogLik Density (Before Prune)")
    + theme(figure_size=(8, 5))
)
p_density_shared.show()

# Unit-specific LogLik densities
p_density_units = (
    ggplot(
        df_second_to_last[df_second_to_last["unit"].isin(unique_units)],
        aes(x="unit logLik"),
    )
    + geom_density(fill="#0D9488", color="#0D9488", alpha=0.4)
    + facet_wrap("unit", scales="free")
    + ggtitle("Unit-Specific LogLik Densities (Before Prune)")
    + theme(figure_size=(16, 12))
)
p_density_units.show()
```
